---
applyTo: ["**/test/**", "**/tests/**", "**/*.test.*", "**/*.spec.*"]
description: "Testing, QA, regression, and release-readiness rules."
---

# Testing Quality Rules

- Test behavior, not private implementation details.
- Keep tests deterministic and independent.
- Add regression coverage for fixed bugs when feasible.
- Do not weaken assertions to force green tests.
- Report skipped validation and residual risk clearly.
